---
title: "Country Analysis"
---

This page tracks changes in life expectancy, GDP per capita, and population over time for one country.

```{python}
#| echo: true
import pandas as pd
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt

df = pd.read_csv("gapminder.csv")

country_name = "China" 
c = df[df["country"] == country_name].sort_values("year")

fig, ax = plt.subplots()
ax.plot(c["year"], c["life_expectancy"], marker="o")
ax.set_xlabel("Year")
ax.set_ylabel("Life expectancy")
ax.set_title(f"{country_name}: Life Expectancy Over Time")
plt.show()

fig, ax = plt.subplots()
ax.plot(c["year"], c["gdp_per_capita"], marker="o")
ax.set_xlabel("Year")
ax.set_ylabel("GDP per capita")
ax.set_title(f"{country_name}: GDP per Capita Over Time")
plt.show()

fig, ax = plt.subplots()
ax.plot(c["year"], c["population_millions"], marker="o")
ax.set_xlabel("Year")
ax.set_ylabel("Population (millions)")
ax.set_title(f"{country_name}: Population Over Time")
plt.show()
